_comment: SINGLE SOURCE for the Education section on the Bio page — edit an entry below to change a school's card. Per-entry fields: institution, course (the degree), year, details (lines shown under the school; each string is its own line, supports **bold**), tags (small pills), coursework (courses grouped by category, shown under the 'Show coursework' dropdown), bioOnly (true = hide from the home page). School logos live in content/logos.json, keyed by institution name. Work/research roles live in content/experience/*.md.

details: Semester abroad in Spain with coursework in Spanish.

courses: Program Design with Data Structures and Algorithms
Ecology and Evolution of Infectious Disease
Intro to Human Development and Education
Money and Power in the Political Economy

courses.course: High School Diploma, Summa Cum Laude
details: 3x National Spanish Exam Gold Winner. President and Founder of the Chess club. Varsity Soccer, Varsity Wrestling.
